name: PII Masking Engine
description: Applies perspective-aware PII masking to the SQLMesh database. Requires a validated BFS hierarchy path from the Schema Traversal Agent.

perspective.description: Semantic perspective to apply when selecting masking rules.

gemin_salt.description: Cryptographic salt for deterministic pseudonymization. Required.

db_path.description: Path to the SQLMesh SQLite database.

bfs_path.description: Ordered dimension->transaction table path from hierarchy_crawler. Optional; defaults to full catalog order.
